g.text: Figure 4X. Text-construction dashboard aligned with the formal 0912 text entities

text.style: fill: #687782; font: 10.5px 'Arial', 'DejaVu Sans', 'Liberation Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: This dashboard stays descriptive: document throughput, province-year coverage, A/B/C/D evolution, and the most active topic strips. It does not substitute for the DID estimands in Part 5.
